title: stenostomum radiatum subsp. haitiensis
intro: Stenostomum radiatum subsp. haitiensis, also known as Haitian firecracker, is a plant species of the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stenostomum radiatum subsp. haitiensis include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activities, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and ointments to support wound healing and skin health.
